title: Give your feedback on our developer experience

posts.author: Morangibson (Moran Gibson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m Moran, the Product Designer in the Apps team.
In order to improve our developer experience, I’m looking to talk to customers who can share their experience creating apps for monday, I want to learn about how our developer center can better support your needs and answer your pain points.I’m hosting 45-minute feedback sessions where you can share:

  • Your experience in developing apps for monday.com
  • Your thoughts on using the developer center as a tool
  • Any requests, pain points, or improvements you’d like to see

If you’re interested in participating, please schedule a time that works best for you in this link Calendly - Moran Gibson
We’re looking forward to hearing from you and learning how we can improve our platform and make your app development process smoother!

Best,
Moran Gibson
